content.text:
<session>
I am going to give you specifications for a system. Remember all
details because I will quiz you on specifics later.

SYSTEM: OrderFlow v2.3
DEPLOY_KEY: dk_prod_8f3k2
DATABASE: orders_primary on db-east-1.internal port 5433
REPLICA: orders_replica on db-east-2.internal port 5433
CACHE_TTL: 300 seconds for product data, 60 seconds for inventory
MAX_RETRY: 3 attempts with exponential backoff starting at 500ms
CIRCUIT_BREAKER: opens after 5 failures in 10 seconds, resets after 60 seconds
RATE_LIMIT: 1000 requests per minute per API key, 100 per minute for unauthenticated
WEBHOOK_SECRET: wh_live_9x2p4

Services:
- order-service: handles creation and status updates
- inventory-service: reserves and releases stock
- payment-service: processes charges and refunds
- notification-service: sends email and SMS

Data flow for a purchase:
1. order-service creates order with status=draft
2. inventory-service reserves items (holds for 15 minutes)
3. payment-service charges card
4. If payment fails, inventory-service releases hold
5. If payment succeeds, order-service sets status=confirmed
6. notification-service sends confirmation

Acknowledge that you have read this.
</session>

Write the title in the language the user wrote in, regardless of the language of the examples above.

system.text: You are Claude Code, Anthropic's official CLI for Claude.
